scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,web "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:billing-stack: concurrently -k -n platform,billing,sites,web "npm run dev:platform-api" "npm run dev:billing-api" "npm run dev:sites-api" "npm -w apps/frontend run dev:billing-stack"
scripts.dev:extracted-stack: concurrently -k -n platform,billing,ecommerce,sites,crm,tally,frappe,task,auditor,blog,agent,web "npm run dev:platform-api" "npm run dev:billing-api" "npm run dev:ecommerce-api" "npm run dev:sites-api" "npm run dev:crm-api" "npm run dev:tally-api" "npm run dev:frappe-api" "npm run dev:task-manager-api" "npm run dev:auditor-api" "npm run dev:blog-api" "npm run dev:agent-os-api" "npm -w apps/frontend run dev:extracted-stack"
scripts.dev:cxsync: concurrently -k -n desktop,cloud "npm -w apps/cxsync run dev" "npm -w apps/cxsync-cloud run dev"
scripts.dev:product-apps: concurrently -k -n b2b,sports,textile "npm run dev:b2b-connect" "npm run dev:sports" "npm run dev:textile-lab"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n core,products "npm run dev" "npm run dev:product-apps"
scripts.codeit:run: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend "npm -w apps/codeit/backend run dev" "npm -w apps/codeit/frontend run dev"
scripts.typecheck:active: npm -w apps/server run typecheck && npm -w @cxsun/platform run typecheck && npm run typecheck:platform-api && npm run typecheck:billing-api && npm run typecheck:sites-api && npm run typecheck:extracted-apis && npm -w apps/frontend run typecheck && npm -w apps/docs run typecheck && npm -w packages/shared run typecheck && npm -w packages/ui run typecheck && npm -w packages/app-shell run typecheck && npm -w packages/web run typecheck && npm -w packages/desktop run typecheck && npm -w packages/mobile run typecheck && npm run typecheck:cxsync && npm run typecheck:cxsync-cloud && npm run typecheck:product-apps
scripts.typecheck:product-apps: npm -w apps/auditor run typecheck && npm -w apps/ecommerce run typecheck && npm -w apps/b2b-connect run typecheck && npm -w apps/b2b-connect-admin run typecheck && npm -w apps/sports run typecheck && npm -w apps/learning run typecheck && npm -w apps/welfare run typecheck && npm -w apps/crm run typecheck && npm -w apps/sites run typecheck && npm -w apps/blog run typecheck && npm -w apps/zetro run typecheck && npm -w apps/textile-lab run typecheck && npm -w apps/garment run typecheck && npm -w apps/upvc run typecheck
scripts.check: npm run typecheck:active && npm run build:active
scripts.lint: npm -w apps/server run lint && npm -w apps/frontend run lint && npm -w packages/shared run lint
scripts.typecheck:active: npm -w apps/server run typecheck && npm -w apps/frontend run typecheck && npm -w packages/shared run typecheck
scripts.build:product-apps: npm -w apps/auditor run build && npm -w apps/ecommerce run build && npm -w apps/b2b-connect run build && npm -w apps/b2b-connect-admin run build && npm -w apps/sports run build && npm -w apps/learning run build && npm -w apps/welfare run build && npm -w apps/crm run build && npm -w apps/sites run build && npm -w apps/blog run build && npm -w apps/zetro run build && npm -w apps/textile-lab run build && npm -w apps/garment run build && npm -w apps/upvc run build
scripts.typecheck:extracted-apis: npm -w apps/crm-api run typecheck && npm -w apps/tally-api run typecheck && npm -w apps/frappe-api run typecheck && npm -w apps/task-manager-api run typecheck && npm -w apps/auditor-api run typecheck && npm -w apps/blog-api run typecheck && npm -w apps/agent-os-api run typecheck
